name: parts_availability
description: Checks whether a specific part is in stock at the workshop or available for same-day/next-day order from a supplier. Useful for urgent repair calls where availability determines whether the customer books today.
requires: Parts supplier API integration: Repco (PRONTO API), Burson Auto Parts, AutoBarn, or workshop's own inventory system
Vehicle details (make/model/year) for part compatibility filtering
el_call_timing: Invoke when caller asks 'do you have the part' or 'can you do it today' for a specific repair
notes: Repco PRONTO is the dominant supplier API in Australia — most independent workshops have a Repco trade account. Burson Auto Parts (Bapcor) also has an API. This tool is most valuable for urgent same-day calls: brake failure, exhaust, cooling system. If part is not in stock, agent offers to order and book for next available day.
